title: Real-time Chat App with WebSockets
statement: Develop a real-time chat application using WebSockets. The application should establish a WebSocket connection for each user, broadcast messages to all connected users, and handle disconnections. Implement a WebSocket endpoint for users to send messages and one for real-time message updates.
constraints: Must use WebSockets for real-time communication
Must broadcast messages to all connected users

endpoints.description: Establish a WebSocket connection with the server
Send a message to the server via WebSocket. The request body should contain the sender's username and the message text.
